/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test-gguf-model-data.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/test-gguf-model-data.dir/test-gguf-model-data.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-gguf-model-data  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin libgguf-model-data.a ../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9190 ../common/libllama-common-base.a ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9190 ../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0 ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a -lpthread /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libssl.so /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libcrypto.so
